title: PokéTransfer
description: A Cobblemon Side-Mod which allows you to transfer Pokémon between worlds!
body:
## **What if...**

You could seamlessly transfer Pokémon between different worlds?
Missing an old partner from a previous adventure? No problem! Let your old friends join you for new journeys without having to cheat them in! Every Pokémon is perfectly copied over with held items, EVs, IVs, Nicknames and More! 

**Features:**
- Commands: /poketransfer deposit <slot 1-6> saves a copy of the chosen party slot, which is then assigned a numerical ID (remember these!); /poketransfer withdraw <id> restores a stored Pokémon into your party (or PC if the party is full).
- One-time deposit: A Pokémon tagged as transferred cannot be deposited again. The flag travels with the Pokémon, so re-deposits stay blocked even after withdrawing it elsewhere.
- World-bound withdraws: Each stored Pokémon can be withdrawn once per world.

Pokémon are stored in:
```
config/poketransfer/<uuid>/<id>.nbt
```
allowing you to copy the config file over for new instances of the game.
